main.name: Wolverine, Best There Is
main.oracle_text:
Unrivaled Lethality — Double all damage Wolverine would deal.
At the beginning of each end step, if Wolverine dealt damage to another creature this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on him.
{1}{G}: Regenerate Wolverine. (The next time he would be destroyed this turn, instead tap him, remove him from combat, and heal all damage on him.)

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.oracle_text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Field of the Dead
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
Whenever this land or another land you control enters, if you control seven or more lands with different names, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Fall of the Hammer
card.oracle_text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature.
card.flavor_text: It is unwise to insult the god of the forge. It is also unwise to stand near anyone else who has insulted him.

card.name: Nature's Claim
card.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Its controller gains 4 life.
card.flavor_text:
"The timeless, tireless jaws of nature shall one day devour us all."
—Sildark, artificer of Omu
